steps.title: Find line l's equation using the parallel lines property
steps.content: The line $y = 8x + 4$ has slope $m = 8$. Since line $l$ is parallel to this line, line $l$ also has slope $8$. Because line $l$ passes through the origin $(0, 0)$, its equation is $y = 8x$.

steps.title: Substitute the point (6, d) to find d
steps.content:
Since line $l$ passes through $(6, d)$ and has equation $y = 8x$, substitute $x = 6$:
$$d = 8(6) = 48$$
